first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: Hi! I am a legally distinct prize animal.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: My tag says NOT A BEAR in very small letters.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: I am filled with cotton and confidential information.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: The confidential part gets itchy when someone familiar walks in.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: You are making my stitches think.

first_meeting.speaker: Pip
first_meeting.text: Enough to be worried that you had to ask.

after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
after_lost_token.text: You brought the Lost Token back.

after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
after_lost_token.text: Good. Tokens get lonely in pockets.

after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
after_lost_token.text: You used to want the blue prize.

first_meeting_after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
first_meeting_after_lost_token.text: Hi. I am a legally distinct prize animal, mostly filled with cotton.

first_meeting_after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
first_meeting_after_lost_token.text: The confidential part gets itchy around familiar people.

first_meeting_after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
first_meeting_after_lost_token.text: Enough to recognize the Lost Token in your hand.

first_meeting_after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
first_meeting_after_lost_token.text: You used to want the blue prize and never had enough tickets.

first_meeting_after_lost_token.speaker: Pip
first_meeting_after_lost_token.text: It may. Old routines leave lint everywhere.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: Hi. I am a legally distinct prize animal with a small amount of confidential information.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: That information gets itchy around someone familiar.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: Enough to be concerned that you had to ask.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: If you want something practical to hold onto, Prize Echo Ascent is awake.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: Collect eighteen tags in order across both rails and open all three locks.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: They remember wanting, returning, and working. The route may show which memories answer to you.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Player
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: I am still getting used to taking directions from a plush, but I will try it.

prize_sort_first_meeting.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_first_meeting.text: A healthy adjustment period. Start from the shelf when you are ready.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: If you want something practical to hold onto, Prize Echo Ascent is awake.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: The shelf beside me holds eighteen numbered echoes across two rails.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: Collect them in order and open all three rail locks.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: The old tags remember wanting, returning, and working. They do not agree on which came first.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Player
prize_sort_intro.text: I am still getting used to taking directions from a plush, but I will try it.

prize_sort_intro.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_intro.text: A healthy adjustment period. Use the shelf when you are ready.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: You brought the Echo Token back. Let me see the rim.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: The prize paint still answers to the same signal the eighteen tags followed. That connects their hopeful memories to you.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: Under it is an old service mark: closing inventory, a shift code, and a maintenance copy.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: The paint remembers wanting this arcade. The mark remembers returning prizes after closing and counting what it owed. Neither remembers a whole owner alone.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Player
prize_sort_completion.text: Then the token may tell me who I was, while the shift code gives Gus something real to trace.

prize_sort_completion.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_completion.text: Exactly. Take it to him. His maintenance copies may tell you what happened while that hope was being kept alive.

prize_sort_replay_return.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_replay_return.text: All eighteen echoes. Again. You did not have to.

prize_sort_replay_return.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_replay_return.text: Which is exactly why it counts.

prize_sort_replay_return.speaker: Pip
prize_sort_replay_return.text: The badge stays on the shelf this time. It earned the rest.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: Some of the stitches went tight and quiet for a while.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: They are loose again. You feel like one whole plush from here.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: Now the stuffing can reach both sides.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: Employee 04 taught the arcade to keep every try, not only the winning ones.

post_reveal.speaker: Pip
post_reveal.text: You are helping it remember the whole player softly.
